seo_description: AeroFlex adaptive performance running shoes, tuned to you.
hero_intro: Race-day energy meets an adaptive fit that reads your foot. Built to go fast, designed to go daily.
collection_description: One adaptive platform. Three distinct expressions. Built for tempo sessions, long efforts, and the miles in between.
technology_lead: AeroFlex reads pressure beneath your foot and responds in real time, creating a secure, personalized hold without a single loose lace.
technology_body: The AeroFit™ Adaptive System pairs pressure-sensing films with a micro-adjustment dial and a Dyneema® cable—stronger than steel by weight, nearly weightless on foot.
diagram_description: Explore the complete AeroFlex construction—from adaptive engineered knit and pressure sensing to PEBA energy return, carbon propulsion, and segmented road grip.
release_description: Join the private release list for early access to AeroFlex 01, fitting appointments, and founder pricing.
